event.description:
*Note: **registration is required** at*
[https://www.meetup.com/deepspeed-meetup-group/events/299786564/](https://www.meetup.com/deepspeed-meetup-group/events/299786564/)

**DeepSpeed** is an easy-to-use deep learning optimization software suite that powers unprecedented scale and speed for both training and inference. DeepSpeed enables world's most powerful language models.

In this meetup, **LinkedIn**, **Intel** and **Microsoft** DeepSpeed teams will present the latest techniques and use cases with DeepSpeed at **LinkedIn HQ** in Mountain View, CA.

Meetup agenda:

* **ML Infrastructure and Platform for Generative AI (LinkedIn)**
* **Learnings of adopting and contributing to ZeRO+ (LinkedIn)**
* **Story of DeepSpeed and DeepSpeed inference on brew models (LinkedIn)**
* **Intel 4th Gen hardware with DeepSpeed (Intel)**
* **DeepSpeed FastGen (DeepSpeed)**
event.title: DeepSpeed Meetup @LinkedIn
